tasks.label: Validate Demand 2026-03-30
Validate Demand KPI Variants
args:
import json;from urllib.parse import quote;from urllib.request import urlopen;base='C:/Users/guilherme.felix/Documents/Relatório Demanda/DASH Forecast/Forecast2';url='http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/demand-dashboard?baseDir='+quote(base,safe='')+'&observationDate=2026-03-30&noCache=1';d=json.loads(urlopen(url,timeout=180).read().decode('utf-8'));rows=[r for r in (d.get('rows') or []) if r.get('mercado') in set(d.get('defaultSelectedMarkets') or [])];

def agg(it):
 p=sum(float(r.get('ocupacao') or 0) for r in it);c=sum(float(r.get('capacidade') or 0) for r in it);return round((p/c)*100,2) if c>0 else 0.0,round(p),round(c)

all7=[r for r in rows if isinstance(r.get('advp'),(int,float)) and r['advp']<=7]
r814=[r for r in rows if isinstance(r.get('advp'),(int,float)) and 8<=r['advp']<=14]
r1521=[r for r in rows if isinstance(r.get('advp'),(int,float)) and 15<=r['advp']<=21]
print(json.dumps({'all_total':agg(rows),'all_7_le':agg(all7),'all_8_14':agg(r814),'all_15_21':agg(r1521)},ensure_ascii=False))
